summary: Tested free tier feature implementation. Fixed critical bug where /api/billing endpoint returned 402 for free tier users. All 12 test cases pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/billing endpoint was blocking free tier users with 402 error. Created new dependency 'get_recruiter_for_billing' that allows pending/free tier users to access billing info.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added get_recruiter_for_billing dependency, updated /api/billing and /api/billing/history endpoints
/app/frontend/src/components/AccountDashboard.js - Added 'Free' option to tier filter dropdown for admin

test_credentials.recruiter_with_package: hr@techcorp.co.za / demo123 (has 'pro' tier, not 'starter' as mentioned)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test recruiters during testing (test_recruiter_*@test.com) - all have 'free' tier
context_for_next_testing_agent: Free tier feature is fully implemented and working. New recruiters get 'free' tier by default. Billing page shows 'No Active Package' card for free tier users. Dashboard and My Listings show 'Activate your account' banner for free tier users. Active tier users don't see the banner.

backend_tests.test_tiers_endpoint_excludes_free: PASSED - /api/tiers returns only purchasable tiers (starter, growth, pro, enterprise)
backend_tests.test_billing_endpoint_for_active_tier: PASSED - /api/billing works for recruiters with active tier
backend_tests.test_new_recruiter_gets_free_tier: PASSED - New recruiters get 'free' tier by default
backend_tests.test_billing_endpoint_for_free_tier: PASSED - /api/billing works for free tier accounts (returns tier_id: 'free')
backend_tests.test_admin_can_access_accounts: PASSED - Admin can access accounts list

frontend_tests.billing_page_free_tier: PASSED - Shows 'No Active Package' card with 'View Plans & Pricing' button
frontend_tests.billing_page_active_tier: PASSED - Shows normal billing overview with 'Current Plan' section
frontend_tests.dashboard_banner_free_tier: PASSED - Shows 'Activate your account' banner with 'View Plans' button
frontend_tests.dashboard_banner_active_tier: PASSED - Banner NOT visible for active tier users
frontend_tests.my_listings_banner_active_tier: PASSED - Banner NOT visible for active tier users
frontend_tests.pricing_page: PASSED - Shows Starter, Growth, Pro, Enterprise plans (no 'Free' tier)
frontend_tests.admin_tier_filter: PASSED - 'Free' option now available in tier filter dropdown

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: /api/billing endpoint returned 402 for free tier users
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: get_current_recruiter dependency blocked users with 'pending' subscription status
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Created new dependency 'get_recruiter_for_billing' that allows pending/free tier users to access billing info

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Admin tier filter dropdown missing 'Free' option
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.root_cause: Dropdown only showed tiers from /api/tiers which excludes 'free'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.fix: Added hardcoded 'Free' option to the dropdown
